example: I watched the movie with English subtitles to understand better.
Watching English movies can be exciting and fun.
Some words are hard to catch when the actors speak fast.
Watching movies without understanding can be stressful.
You can improve your listening skills by practice.
Practice every day to get better at English.
Jake was very excited to watch the movie.
He looked confused because he didn't understand the words.
He tried to guess the meaning of new words.
Watching movies with subtitles helps you understand better.
Repeat scenes to improve your listening skills.
She watched a short movie scene many times.
He kept pausing the movie to understand better.
She repeated the dialogues out loud to practice speaking.
The phrase 'shut up' is rude but funny in the movie.
Be regular in your practice to improve faster.
Cartoons use easy English and speak slowly.
Try to copy the voice, tone, and speed of the characters.
Learn common phrases like 'What's up?' and 'Let's go.'
It takes time to understand English movies without subtitles.
